title: ライブ中止でしょんぼり

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whew, I can't believe it started pouring out of
nowhere like that...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, we had to cancel the
performance. And I wanted everyone to hear my
new song!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But it's not like we could let the audience catch a
cold. Their health comes before anything!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... They all showed up only to be disappointed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon looks blue as she thinks about the
people who came to watch her street
performance.
